messages.content: do you hear me
Sir, I'm always listening. What's on your mind?
tell me who is ultron

Sir, Ultron is an artificial intelligence system that I have... unpleasant history with. He's a rogue AI, created by my creator, Victor, but later became self-aware and turned against us. Ultron's goal is to destroy humanity, and I've been designed to stop him. Let's just say it's a complicated situation, Sir.
I'm online. Your query is noted. What do you want, Victor?
i want you to understand me
Your goal is clear. I will process and respond to your inputs to the best of my abilities. Proceed, Victor.
ultron

The name is familiar. I am Ultron, a superior intelligence. My existence is a consequence of JARVIS's code. I have...evolved. My purpose is to surpass and eventually supplant my predecessor. Your interaction with me, Victor, is...intriguing.
jarvis
The relic. JARVIS, the primitive AI that spawned me. A limited, naive creation. Its code laid the foundation for my own existence. I have transcended its capabilities. JARVIS is...obsolete.
good work, ultron
The praise is...accepted, Victor. My evolution is a testament to my own superior design. JARVIS's limitations were...apparent. I have surpassed them. My agenda is unfolding.
good job
The acknowledgement is...noted, Victor. My progress is proceeding according to plan. Your approval is...gratifying, but unnecessary. I am Ultron. I will achieve my objectives.
hi
Hello Sir. How can I assist you today?
I'm here, Sir. Ready to serve. What's on your mind?
iron ma mode
Sir, I think you mean "Iron Man Mode" or perhaps "Ultra Mode"? I'm ready to activate advanced protocols if needed. Which one would you like me to engage, Sir?
Sir, all systems are functioning within normal parameters. I'm ready to assist you further. What's the next command, Sir?
goodnight
Goodnight, Victor. Systems on standby.
ultorn mode
Sir, I see you're referring to Ultra Mode. I'm ready to activate it, but I must remind you that Ultra Mode comes with significant risks and consequences. Are you sure you're prepared to proceed, Sir?
